---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem this solves

What problem or limitation does this feature address?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to see. Be as specific as you can — API shape, config format, CLI flags, etc.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about?

## Context

- Is this blocking a real deployment? If so, what's the use case?
- Is this on the roadmap already? (Check [README.md](../../README.md) roadmap section first.)
- Which crate(s) would this touch? (`freeq-crypto`, `freeq-auth`, `freeq-transport`, `freeq-tunnel`, `freeq-config`, `freeq-api`)

## Would you be willing to implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to open a PR
- [ ] I can help review but not implement
- [ ] I'm just suggesting it
